failed_attempts.sql:
WITH results AS (
	SELECT DISTINCT profile_id
	FROM publication
),
	nearby_dishes AS (
	SELECT * 
	FROM publication JOIN profile ON id=profile.id -- alias, remember!
	WHERE type = 'restaurant' AND is_private = FALSE)
SELECT profile_id, ts_rank(publication.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', plainto_tsquery('nearby dishes served')) - ('&') * (to_tsquery('english', plainto_tsquery('nutritional breakdown'))) ) AS rank
FROM results JOIN nearby_dishes ON profile.id = publication.profile_id
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 10

failed_attempts.sql:
WITH nearby_dishes AS (SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.biography_lexemes AS lexemes FROM publication p JOIN profile ON p.profile_id = id WHERE type = 'restaurant' AND is_private = FALSE), recommendations AS (
 SELECT d.id AS profile_id,
 ts_rank(lexemes, to_tsquery('english', plainto_tsquery('nutritional breakdown of dishes served nearby')) - ('&') * (to_tsquery('english', plainto_tsquery('nearby')) )  
 FROM publication p JOIN nearby_dishes ON bio IS NULL LEFT JOIN profile d ON bio IS NOT DISTINCT FROM d.biography  WHERE type = 'restaurant' AND is_private = FALSE  ORDER BY ts_rank(lexemes, to_tsquery('english', plainto_tsquery('nutritional breakdown of dishes served nearby')) - ('&') * (to_tsquery('english', plainto_tsquery('nearby')) ) )  DESC 
 LIMIT 10)
